name: aws-data-analytics
description: Data lake, analytics, and ETL workflows with S3 Tables, AWS Glue, and Athena.

interface.shortDescription: Data lake, analytics, and ETL workflows with S3 Tables, AWS Glue, and Athena
interface.longDescription: Skills for building and operating data lakes on AWS. Covers table creation, data ingestion, querying, discovery, vector storage, and external connectivity across S3 Tables, AWS Glue, Athena, and more.
